evidence: "Monty Python taught that 'nobody expects the Spanish Inquisition,' but here is a film suggesting that the Inquisition..."

"This film is made up of 55 shots, most of which represent a discrete narrative element..."
"The directorial style of this film is something all its own. It uses film grammar from every era of cinema history..."

"How fortunate to have one of the finest living actresses under the direction of such an ardent admirer of women as Jacques Rivette!"

summary: The user has a strong preference for complex, art-house dramas with high production quality and emotional depth. They appreciate slow pacing and are particularly loyal to directors like Rivette and Mizoguchi, indicating a taste for nuanced storytelling and rich sensory experiences.
